title: methods: replace (api_url, account_id) params with &Session
description:
What: Remove api_url: &str and account_id: &str from all 10 typed method wrappers in methods.rs; replace with session: &Session. Update all call sites in client_task.rs and methods_test.rs.

Algorithm:

PART 1 — methods.rs changes:
For each of the 10 methods (chat_get, chat_query, chat_changes, message_get, message_query, message_changes, message_create, chat_contact_get, read_position_get, read_position_set, presence_status_get):
1. Remove api_url: &str and account_id: &str parameters.
2. Add session: &crate::jmap::Session as first parameter (after &self).
3. In the method body, replace api_url with &session.api_url, and replace account_id with the result of:
   let account_id = session.chat_account_id().ok_or_else(|| crate::error::ClientError::InvalidSession("no chat account_id for urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat"))?;
4. Remove any #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] suppressions that were only needed because of the two extra params (check each method's arg count without the 2 removed params).

PART 2 — methods_test.rs changes:
For every call like client.chat_get(&api_url, "account1", ...) in tests:
1. Create a minimal Session fixture (use serde_json::from_str with a hand-written JSON string for the session):
   let session: Session = serde_json::from_str(r#"{"capabilities":{},"accounts":{},"primaryAccounts":{"urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat":"account1"},"username":"test","apiUrl":"http://...","downloadUrl":"","uploadUrl":"","eventSourceUrl":"","state":""}"}#).unwrap();
   Use the mock server url for apiUrl (e.g., the wiremock base_url).
2. Pass &session instead of the two separate string args.

PART 3 — client_task.rs changes:
For every call to a jmap-chat typed method (chat_query, chat_get, message_query, message_get, message_create, read_position_set, read_position_get, chat_changes, etc.):
1. Remove the api_url and account_id arguments.
2. Pass &session instead.
3. Remove the local api_url: String and account_id: String variables extracted from the session (lines ~97-119 of client_task.rs) since they are no longer needed.
4. Helper functions that previously took api_url: &str, account_id: &str should be updated to take session: &Session instead.
5. The #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] on try_mark_read (if it still triggers after this change) should be evaluated — remove if no longer needed.

Defensive rules:
- Session::chat_account_id() returns Option<&str>; use ok_or_else to propagate as ClientError::InvalidSession.
- Do not store session inside JmapChatClient — methods take it by reference on each call.
- Do not change the low-level client.call() method (it keeps api_url: &str — that's fine, it's the transport layer).
- After removing api_url/account_id locals from client_task.rs, double check the session is still accessible in all the places it's referenced.

Tests:
- All existing tests pass (they just pass &session instead of two strings).
- cargo test -p jmap-chat and cargo test -p jmap-chat-egui both pass.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes. No remaining api_url or account_id positional string parameters on any typed method wrapper in methods.rs.
